summary: The diff implements the vast majority of requirements across both frontend and backend. All major pages, components, hooks, and backend logic appear present. A few specific acceptance criteria have gaps or are uncertain due to file truncation, but overall implementation is thorough.

missing_requirements.requirement: Product Detail page: size variant selector
missing_requirements.reason: REQ-12 requires color and/or size variant selectors. The Product type in backend/main.mo has no sizes field, suggesting size variants are not implemented. ProductDetailPage file was omitted from diff so cannot confirm color selector either.

missing_requirements.requirement: Collections page color filter passed to backend query
missing_requirements.reason: FilterControls.tsx shows a color filter UI, but useQueries.ts useGetAllProducts does not pass a color parameter to the backend. REQ-11 requires color filtering to be functional.

missing_requirements.requirement: All data persists across canister upgrades using stable variables
missing_requirements.reason: The backend uses Map.empty() for in-memory state and a var for nextProductId with no visible stable variable declarations or pre/postupgrade hooks in the truncated backend/main.mo. Data will not persist across canister upgrades.

hallucinated_features.description: Search icon button in the Header navigation
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-2 specifies cart icon, wishlist icon, and hamburger menu only. No search icon was requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Wishlist count badge on the wishlist icon in the header
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-2 specifies a cart item count badge but does not specify a wishlist count badge.

hallucinated_features.description: Secondary 'Our Story' CTA button in the Hero section
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-3 specifies only a 'Shop Now' CTA button. A second 'Our Story' button navigating to /about was added beyond the requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: Scroll indicator with animated line at the bottom of the Hero section
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-3 does not specify a scroll indicator element.

hallucinated_features.description: Stats panel in the Brand Story section showing years, handcrafted percentage, and artisan count
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-5 specifies a headline, 2-3 paragraphs, and optional side image. A stats strip was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: addProduct mutation exposed in useQueries.ts for frontend product management
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement mentions an admin interface or ability to add products via the frontend. REQ-15 only requires listing, fetching, reviewing, and subscribing functions.

hallucinated_features.description: Reviewer location/city field displayed in Testimonials
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-7 specifies reviewer name, star rating, and quote only. A city or location field was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Full Privacy Policy and Terms of Service page routes implemented
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-10 mentions these as footer links only. Full page component implementations were built beyond what was specified.

hallucinated_features.description: Cart state persisted to localStorage across browser sessions
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-13 specifies cart state persists across page navigations within the session. localStorage persistence goes beyond the stated session-scoped requirement.
